title: gnome-shell bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[3.32.2-58]
- Don't hard depend on gnome-session-xsession to allow
  using other session types, e.g. wayland
  Resolves: RHEL-110531
full_text:
[3.32.2-58]
- Don't hard depend on gnome-session-xsession to allow
  using other session types, e.g. wayland
  Resolves: RHEL-110531

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-17422.html
